Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc'S Motion For Order To Charge Member'S Interest
Off Calendar Oct-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc's Motion For Order To Charge Member's Interest is GRANTED as unopposed. Prevailing party to prepare the order. James Watson, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
